nextSourceBatches.searchFocus: SEC, FINRA, CFTC, CME, CBOE, Nasdaq, NYSE, ICE, OCC terms and data documentation
nextSourceBatches.reason: Market-data and exchange documents are high-authority but often blocked by HEAD or require terms review.

nextSourceBatches.searchFocus: lookahead bias, survivorship bias, data snooping, transaction costs, slippage, walk-forward validation
nextSourceBatches.reason: Backtesting lessons need stronger source grounding before becoming professional course material.

nextSourceBatches.searchFocus: GDELT, EDGAR event metadata, macro calendars, earnings calendars, sentiment API terms
nextSourceBatches.reason: The product needs historical news and sentiment context, but only with clear source boundaries.

nextSourceBatches.searchFocus: investor behavior, fraud psychology, risk tolerance, behavioral finance, cognitive bias education
nextSourceBatches.reason: Psychology coverage now passes the stage gate but remains the thinnest domain.

boundary: This backlog tracks retry and review work only. It does not authorize content reuse, market-data redistribution, trading advice, signals, broker workflows, auto-trading, performance claims, or real-money guidance.
